message:
feat(connectors): add IRC and Nostr connector scaffolds

Add initial connector scaffolds for two additional platform integrations:

- irc: IRC protocol connector scaffold with channel join/part, message
  send/receive, and nick management operations. Connects to IRC servers
  via standard TCP with optional TLS.

- nostr: Nostr relay connector scaffold with event publish, subscribe,
  and relay management operations via the Nostr protocol (NIP-01).
  Supports relay pool connections and event filtering.

Both were already registered in the workspace Cargo.toml members list
from the core infrastructure commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-irc"
+description = "IRC connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_irc"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-irc"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
+fcp-sdk.workspace = true
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+url.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,62 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.irc"
+name = "IRC"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "IRC connector for bounded connect, join, message send, transcript sampling, and health verification"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc2812"
+
+# Scope notes:
+# - This first slice uses short-lived IRC sessions per operation.
+# - Long-lived event streams, SASL negotiation, DCC, and bouncer management are deferred.
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:community"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work", "z:community", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:community", "z:project:*", "z:public"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-community"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+[provides.operations.messages_send]
+summary = "Send an IRC PRIVMSG"
+capability = "irc.messages.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.channels_join]
+summary = "Join an IRC channel"
+capability = "irc.channels.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations.transcript_sample]
+summary = "Open a short IRC session and collect a bounded transcript sample"
+capability = "irc.messages.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Verify IRC connectivity and registration flow"
+capability = "irc.health.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 30
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+//! FCP IRC connector.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod connector;
+
+pub use connector::IrcConnector;

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-nostr"
+description = "Nostr relay connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_nostr"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-nostr"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
+fcp-sdk.workspace = true
+fcp-streaming.workspace = true
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+reqwest.workspace = true
+secp256k1 = { version = "0.29", features = ["rand", "hashes", "global-context"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+url.workspace = true
+uuid.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,63 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.nostr"
+name = "Nostr Relay"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Nostr relay connector for signed public-note publishing, event queries, relay inspection, and health verification"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://github.com/nostr-protocol/nips"
+
+# Scope notes:
+# - This first slice publishes signed public notes (kind 1 by default) and reads public events.
+# - Bech32 key input, encrypted DMs (NIP-04/NIP-17), profile publishing, and long-lived relay
+#   subscriptions are explicit non-goals for this initial connector.
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:community"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work", "z:community", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:community", "z:project:*", "z:public"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-community"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+[provides.operations.notes_publish]
+summary = "Publish a signed Nostr note to configured relays"
+capability = "nostr.notes.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.events_query]
+summary = "Query public Nostr events from configured relays"
+capability = "nostr.events.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.relays_list]
+summary = "List configured Nostr relays"
+capability = "nostr.relays.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Verify relay connectivity and signing identity"
+capability = "nostr.health.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 30
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+//! FCP Nostr connector.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+
+pub mod connector;
+
+pub use connector::NostrConnector;
